Title: Improper detection of disallowed URIs by Loofah `allowed_uri?`
Description:
`Loofah::HTML5::Scrub.allowed_uri?` does not correctly reject `javascript:` URIs when the scheme is split by HTML entity-encoded control characters such as `` (carriage return), `
` (line feed), or `	` (tab).
AffectedVersions: All versions starting from 2.25.0 before 2.25.1, version 2.25.0
